summary: Implemented the Threat Model module (US-028). Created `src/ui/threat-model-card.ts` with `createThreatCard` and `createThreatCardList` functions following the shadow-profile-card pattern. Created `src/modules/threat-model/threat-model-module.ts` which orchestrates data collection (snapshot, permissions, entropy, permission debt, inferences), evaluates threat rules, and renders risk cards with severity badges (Low/Medium/High), descriptions, evidence lists, user impact, and category labels. Added `threat-model.css` with severity modifier classes, responsive grid layout, and reduced-motion support. Registered the module in `main.ts` after shadow profile rendering and imported CSS in `global.css`. Fixed test mock setup to handle jsdom's `ontouchstart` window property that prevented all 4 threat categories from triggering. All 851 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
